disambiguated.context: At the bar, two different people approached a man sitting alone at the bar - one of them was Zeinab Qureshi and the other Annie Choi. Zeinab Qureshi passed by him and ordered a drink from the bartender while Annie Choi told the man their typical rate for spending the night together.
disambiguated.question: Who was a prostitute?
